caption: The video begins with a close-up shot of blurred, colorful lights against a dark background, creating a bokeh effect that suggests a nighttime setting. As the camera slowly zooms out, the focus shifts to reveal a distant cityscape illuminated by various lights. The scene is set over a body of water, likely a lake or sea, which reflects some of the ambient light. The sky above is dark and cloudy, adding to the serene yet mysterious atmosphere. In the distance, faint outlines of hills or mountains can be seen, further enhancing the depth and scale of the landscape. The overall mood of the video is calm and contemplative, capturing the beauty of a quiet night by the water.
